payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields are: token counts, provider/model IDs, estimated price, and latency percentiles p50, p90, and p95. Token counts should capture input/output usage; provider and model IDs identify the exact system; estimated price summarizes cost; and p50/p90/p95 latency report median and tail response times.
payload.decision: Provide the required fields and what each one means, including token counts, provider/model identifiers, estimated price, and latency percentiles p50/p90/p95.

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entities were provided to resolve.

payload.intent: Explain the required evaluation accounting fields for cost and latency reporting.

memory_cards.statement: Evaluation accounting should include token counts for both input and output, plus any total token count if available.
Evaluation accounting should include provider and model identifiers so results can be attributed to the exact LLM setup used.
Evaluation accounting should include an estimated price or cost metric derived from usage and provider pricing.
Evaluation accounting should include latency summaries at p50, p90, and p95 to describe typical and tail performance.

details: Included token counts, provider/model IDs, estimated price, and latency percentiles p50/p90/p95.

repair_options: If you want, I can rewrite this as a schema checklist.
If you want, I can turn this into a concise spec blurb for documentation.
